Tech support that feels human.

Tech doesn’t have to be stressful. I’m here to help.

I provide calm, written tech support for everyday issues across devices and apps. Tell me what’s going on and I’ll let you know if I can help — no pressure, no commitment.

How it works

  1. Free consultation — send a short description and screenshots (optional).
  2. Confirm flat rate — if it’s in scope, I’ll share the flat rate and a brief outline.
  3. Receive guidance — step‑by‑step instructions by email within 24–48 hours.

Flat rate: $30 per issue

Contact me to start
